chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا عِنْدَ الْأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ آيَاتِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 37 – What is with the Imams<sup>asws</sup> from the Signs of the Prophets<sup>as</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (39/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (39/ 3)
text: خَرَجَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) ذَاتَ لَيْلَةٍ بَعْدَ عَتَمَةٍ وَ هُوَ يَقُولُ هَمْهَمَةً هَمْهَمَةً وَ لَيْلَةً مُظْلِمَةً خَرَجَ عَلَيْكُمُ الْإِمَامُ عَلَيْهِ قَمِيصُ آدَمَ وَ فِي يَدِهِ خَاتَمُ سُلَيْمَانَ وَ عَصَا مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Musa Bin Sa’dan, from Abu Al Hassan Al Asady, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> went out one night after dark, and he<sup>asws</sup> was saying, muttering, murmuring: ‘And the night is dark, the Imam<sup>asws</sup> has come out to you all! Upon him<sup>asws</sup> is the shirt of Adam<sup>as</sup>, and in his<sup>asws</sup> hand is a ring of Suleyman and a Staff of Musa<sup>as</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Musa ibn Sa‘dan from abu al-Hassan al-’Asadi from abu Basir from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “Amir al-Mu’mini (a.s.) once came out during the night after the ‘Isha’ prayer saying , ‘Ham hama, ham ham’and it is a dark night. The Imam (a.s.) has come out to you and he is wearing the shirt of Adam (a.s.). He wearing the ring of Solomon (a.s.) and in hands he has the Staff of Moses (a.s.).”
